Simple flow

Imagine. Approve. Dream.

Three easy steps, made for tired parents and excited kids.

01

Child shares an idea

They speak or type something simple like “me and Teddy meet a sleepy dragon.”

02

Parent reviews it

You see the title, mood, lesson, length, and can edit before anything plays.

03

The story appears

DreamTale creates a cozy storybook with magical art and soft narration.

Made for every night

Not just AI. A bedtime routine.

Quick nightly stories, premium illustrated books, and saved favorites kids can replay again and again.

Surprise Me for instant bedtime magic
Build a Story with mood, lesson, characters, and voice
Ask My Child with voice input and parent approval
Save favorites in a beautiful story library

The app

A magical flow, screen by screen.

Clean, cozy, parent-safe, and designed to feel like a premium bedtime storybook.

Home

Story Modes

Builder

Voice Idea

Reader

Story quality

Built to make good stories.

DreamTale uses a controlled story engine, not one random prompt.

Story brief

Turns the child’s idea into a safe bedtime plan.

Outline first

Beginning, middle, lesson, wind-down, and ending.

Quality check

Reviews calmness, age fit, warmth, and safety.

Soft narration

Read aloud in a calm voice made for sleep.

Parent-first safety

Child imagination. Parent control.

DreamTale is guided creation, not an open child chatbot. The parent always approves the story before playback.

Parent preview

Review before the story is generated.

No open chat

Kids follow a safe story flow.

Voice privacy

Audio can be deleted after use.

Avoid topics

Parents set what not to include.

Simple plans built around nightly minis and special illustrated storybooks.
